title: Add Existing Server
page_subtitle: Bring an existing server folder into SeaLantern so you can manage it here.
server_folder_hint: Choose a server folder that is already set up. SeaLantern will try to detect common startup options.
startup_mode_hint: Choose startup mode: JAR for direct launch, or BAT/SH for script launch
port_hint: Default port 25565, can be auto-read from server.properties
step_folder_desc: Tell SeaLantern where the existing server lives
step_startup_desc: Choose how this server is normally started
step_config_desc: Confirm the name, Java, memory, and other basics
step_action_desc: Add this existing server to your server list
startup_mode_auto_desc: Try common startup files first and attach {{folder}} using what SeaLantern finds
